channel.title: My Car Story With Lou Page
channel.description: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: This 1966 Cobra Was Only Used For Racing!
item.description: Pure performance — this 1966 Cobra was built for the track and never saw the street.

media:content.media:title: This 1966 Cobra Was Only Used For Racing!
media:content.media:description: Pure performance — this 1966 Cobra was built for the track and never saw the street.
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: A Look at a 1963 Corvette | My Car Story With Lou
item.description: Lou takes us through a 1963 Corvette — a split‑window icon that remains one of the most collectible Corvettes ever built.

media:content.media:title: A Look at a 1963 Corvette | My Car Story With Lou
media:content.media:description: Lou takes us through a 1963 Corvette — a split‑window icon that remains one of the most collectible Corvettes ever built.
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: 1953 Buick Skylark Convertible in Green
item.description: Classic elegance meets bold color — this 1953 Buick Skylark Convertible in green is a head‑turner from every angle.

media:content.media:title: 1953 Buick Skylark Convertible in Green
media:content.media:description: Classic elegance meets bold color — this 1953 Buick Skylark Convertible in green is a head‑turner from every angle.
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: A Look at a 1953 Corvette Survivor
item.description: One of the earliest Corvettes still on the road — this 1953 survivor tells the story of America’s sports car beginnings.

media:content.media:title: A Look at a 1953 Corvette Survivor
media:content.media:description: One of the earliest Corvettes still on the road — this 1953 survivor tells the story of America’s sports car beginnings.
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: 58K‑Mile 1977 Charger Daytona
item.description: A rare survivor with only 58,000 miles, this 1977 Charger Daytona shows off its muscle heritage and unique styling.

media:content.media:title: 58K‑Mile 1977 Charger Daytona
media:content.media:description: A rare survivor with only 58,000 miles, this 1977 Charger Daytona shows off its muscle heritage and unique styling.
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: The Lightest GT40 Ever Built!
item.description: The Ford GT40 was built to dominate — and this one takes it even further. Known as the lightest GT40 ever, it’s a rare piece of racing history engineered for ultimate performance.

media:content.media:title: The Lightest GT40 Ever Built!
media:content.media:description: The Ford GT40 was built to dominate — and this one takes it even further. Known as the lightest GT40 ever, it’s a rare piece of racing history engineered for ultimate performance.
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: This ’65 Volkswagen Is Fantastic Both Inside & Out
item.description: From its charming exterior to its surprisingly refined interior, this 1965 Volkswagen proves that simplicity never goes out of style. A true classic that shines from every angle.

media:content.media:title: This ’65 Volkswagen Is Fantastic Both Inside & Out
media:content.media:description: From its charming exterior to its surprisingly refined interior, this 1965 Volkswagen proves that simplicity never goes out of style. A true classic that shines from every angle.
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: 1956 Imperial Southampton 2‑Door 354 Hemi V8 in Blue
item.description: Luxury meets muscle in this rare 1956 Imperial Southampton. With its 354 Hemi V8 and striking blue finish, this two‑door coupe is a stunning blend of elegance and brute force.

media:content.media:title: 1956 Imperial Southampton 2‑Door 354 Hemi V8 in Blue
media:content.media:description: Luxury meets muscle in this rare 1956 Imperial Southampton. With its 354 Hemi V8 and striking blue finish, this two‑door coupe is a stunning blend of elegance and brute force.
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: 1965 Shelby AC Cobra
item.description: The ’65 Shelby AC Cobra is a legend of speed and style — raw power wrapped in timeless curves. This clip takes you up close with one of the most iconic muscle machines ever built.

media:content.media:title: 1965 Shelby AC Cobra
media:content.media:description: The ’65 Shelby AC Cobra is a legend of speed and style — raw power wrapped in timeless curves. This clip takes you up close with one of the most iconic muscle machines ever built.
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: Taking a Ride in a California Car | Mustang ’66
item.description: This sun‑soaked ’66 Mustang still carries the spirit of classic California cruising. What makes this vintage ride feel so smooth and timeless on the open road?

media:content.media:title: Taking a Ride in a California Car | Mustang ’66
media:content.media:description: This sun‑soaked ’66 Mustang still carries the spirit of classic California cruising. What makes this vintage ride feel so smooth and timeless on the open road?
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: Rare 1964 Pontiac Bonneville!
item.description: A full‑size cruiser with unmistakable early‑’60s flair. What hidden features make this Bonneville such a prized survivor today?

media:content.media:title: Rare 1964 Pontiac Bonneville!
media:content.media:description: A full‑size cruiser with unmistakable early‑’60s flair. What hidden features make this Bonneville such a prized survivor today?
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: One‑of‑a‑Kind Quadracycle
item.description: A machine unlike anything else on the road. What unique engineering twist makes this quadracycle a true one‑off?

media:content.media:title: One‑of‑a‑Kind Quadracycle
media:content.media:description: A machine unlike anything else on the road. What unique engineering twist makes this quadracycle a true one‑off?
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: 1966 Oldsmobile 442: A Rare Classic Ride
item.description: A true muscle‑era standout, the ’66 442 blends power and style in a way few cars of its time could match. What rare details set this one apart?

media:content.media:title: 1966 Oldsmobile 442: A Rare Classic Ride
media:content.media:description: A true muscle‑era standout, the ’66 442 blends power and style in a way few cars of its time could match. What rare details set this one apart?
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: The Unexpected Luxury of the ’70 Fury Sport G
item.description: Chrysler’s Fury Sport G wasn’t just muscle—it was comfort wrapped in attitude. What surprising features set this ’70 model apart from the rest of the lineup?

media:content.media:title: The Unexpected Luxury of the ’70 Fury Sport G
media:content.media:description: Chrysler’s Fury Sport G wasn’t just muscle—it was comfort wrapped in attitude. What surprising features set this ’70 model apart from the rest of the lineup?
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: This 1960 Eldorado Convertible Is Incredibly Rare
item.description: A true Cadillac icon, the 1960 Eldorado Convertible stands as one of the rarest luxury cruisers of its era. What hidden details make this survivor even more special than it looks?

media:content.media:title: This 1960 Eldorado Convertible Is Incredibly Rare
media:content.media:description: A true Cadillac icon, the 1960 Eldorado Convertible stands as one of the rarest luxury cruisers of its era. What hidden details make this survivor even more special than it looks?
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: This ’56 Continental Mark II Is in Pristine Condition!
item.description: Elegance preserved. What makes the ’56 Continental Mark II such a rare and pristine find?

media:content.media:title: This ’56 Continental Mark II Is in Pristine Condition!
media:content.media:description: Elegance preserved. What makes the ’56 Continental Mark II such a rare and pristine find?
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page
